# Sans Souci Ongles & Spa

> Nail salon and beauty spa inside CF Carrefour Laval (Entrée 6), Laval, Québec.
> Manicures, spa pedicures, lash extensions and waxing. 20+ years of expertise,
> 1000+ gel colours, 4.2★ service. Walk-ins welcome; online booking available.
> Site is available in French (default), English, Spanish and Arabic.

- Address: 3035 Boulevard le Carrefour, Entrée 6, Laval, QC H7T 1C8, Canada
- Phone: +1 (450) 505-6450
- Email: info@onglessanssouci.com
- Hours: Mon–Tue 09:00–19:00 · Wed–Fri 09:00–21:00 · Sat–Sun 09:00–17:00
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sans.souci.cflaval
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sans.souci.cflaval/

## Services
- [Manicure](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/services/manicure): gel and classic manicures, 1000+ colours.
- [Pedicure](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/services/pedicure): spa pedicure treatments.
- [Lash extensions](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/services/lash-extensions): classic, 2D/3D and hybrid sets.
- [Waxing](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/services/waxing): facial and body waxing.
- [All services](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/services)

- [Gel vs regular polish](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/comparisons/gel-vs-regular-manicure)

- [2D vs 3D vs hybrid lashes](https://onglessanssouci.com/en/comparisons/lashes-2d-3d-hybrid)
